'''Hodrix''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] who was a [[Swoop racing/Legends|swoop racer]] and a member of [[Team NaKuda]]. As a newcomer to the sport, racing on [[Caprioril]], he quickly upstaged the former favorite, [[Serji-X Arrogantus]]. He perished in a massive explosion which killed nearly 200,000 swoop race spectators by an [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]].
